title: What is a Kaiju User?
overview: When high-school freshman Yomogi Asanaka stumbles across kaiju user Gauma, he and a few unsuspecting onlookers get caught up in a fight against kaiju.

title: What's Your Reason for Fighting?
overview: Yomogi and Yume visit the city where they fought the Kaiju and witness the tragedy. He and the others start their Dynazenon maneuver training, but a Kaiju appears again without any delay.

title: What Is a Traitor?
overview: One of the Kaiju Eugenicists, Juuga, tells Yomogi that they were betrayed by Gauma. Yomogi and the others become distrustful of Gauma but they end up having to fight a Kaiju with their hearts in disarray. With their hearts separated, Dynazenon is unable to unleash its full power.

title: What Is This Thumping Heart?
overview: Yomogi catches a cold and goes to sleep. Gauma gets Yume to visit him. Yomogi is confused by Yume's sudden visit, but the relationship between the two slightly unravels. When Yume hears that a monster had appeared, she leaves Yomogi with his cold and heads for battle.

title: What's Lover-Like Mean?
overview: At Chise's suggestion, Yomogi and his friends go to a large outdoor pool, but there is unexpected company there. Gauma orders Yomogi and Yumemi to pretend to be lovers for a certain mission.

title: What Is This Pain?
overview: Yume hears a rumor about Kano's death from an alumni of the chorus club which Kano was in while she was alive. Meanwhile, Koyomi awakens from a hangover and finds that he has lost Dynastriker. Gauma scolds Koyomi and he is reminded of someone he met the previous night.

title: What's Our Reason for Coming Together?
overview: Dynazenon is defeated by the Kaiju. A mysterious giant that appears. Despite the confusion, Onija and Mujina begin to fight the giant. Gauma has no way to repair the damaged Dynazenon.

title: What Is This Wavering Emotion?
overview: A Kaiju spreads confusion throughout the city. Gauma and the others make their first attempt to capture a Kaiju.

title: What Are These Overlapping Emotions?
overview: Yomogi and Yume hear about how Kano died. A Kaiju suddenly appears without them being able to take in the story. Meanwhile, Chise holds onto a secret.

title: Which Memories Do You Regret?
overview: An unprecedentedly great power attack the city. Yomogi takes hold of Dynasoldier to confront the root of it all.

title: What Wish Can't Come True?
overview: Yomogi and the others begin to resume their everyday life, and the Kaiju Eugenicists who have lost their Kaiju also lose their place in the world.

title: What Was I Entrusted With?
overview: Yomogi and the others combine into Dynazenon once more for the final battle.
